case.title: COMMERCIAL BARGE LINES, v. UNITED STATES

opinion.h1: COMMERCIAL BARGE LINES, v. UNITED STATES, 359 U.S. 342 (1959)
opinion.h4: COMMERCIAL BARGE LINES, INC., ET AL. v. UNITED STATES ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE EASTERN DISTRICT OF MICHIGAN. No. 721. Decided April 27, 1959.
opinion.p: Dudley B. Tenney and Nuel D. Belnap for appellants.
Solicitor General Rankin, Assistant Attorney General Hansen, Robert W. Ginnane and Charlie H. Johns for the United States and the Interstate Commerce Commission, appellees.
Stuart B. Bradley, Carl Helmetag, Jr., J. D. Feeney, Harry C. Ames, R. Granville Curry, Frederick M. Dolan, Donald Macleay and Russell S. Bernhard for Carrier Appellees.
The motions to affirm are granted and the judgment is affirmed.
